title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.035 - Confinement, where
text:
40.035.  Confinement, where. — Persons confined other than in a military institution, whether before, during or after trial by a military court, shall be confined in municipal, county or state confinement facilities designated by the governor or by such person as the governor may authorize to act.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 11)
